allow: Bash(node -e "const { Client } = require\(''pg''\); const c = new Client\({connectionString:''postgresql://optipay_user:strongpassword@localhost:5432/optipay_db''}\); c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\(''DB OK''\); c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>console.log\(''DB ERROR:'',e.message\)\)")
